description: Blueprint of active features, feature flags, dependencies, and business values

features.name: MLM Rank Promotion Hierarchy
definitions: Upgrade users' ranks (e.g. Executive, Manager) and roles ('leader') based on downline active legs volumes and sponsor metrics.
features.businessValue: Drives platform engagement and rewards networking behavior.

features.name: Leadership Eligibility Toggle
definitions: Enables toggling if a plan's deposits should propagate downline binary tree volumes or count towards rank requirements.
features.businessValue: Allows customized fintech configurations for high-interest/special products that shouldn't inflate pairing tree commissions.

features.name: Alliance Growth Network (Binary MLM)
definitions: Binary placement tree structure supporting pairing cycles, commission matching, and downline volume calculations.
features.businessValue: Primary user growth and commission engine.
